productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Grey Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into pair of striped socks from United Colors of  Benetton. A glimpse of this sock from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans add a hint of eccentricity to your classic style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneGrey with tricolour stripesSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
